name: Mine Mole
desc: The first time this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. If this card is sent to the GY for the Synchro Summon of a Beast monster: Draw 1 card. If this face-up card you control leaves the field by your opponent's card effect, banish it.
mnst_eff: The first time this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. If this card is sent to the GY for the Synchro Summon of a Beast monster: Draw 1 card. If this face-up card you control leaves the field by your opponent's card effect, banish it.
eff: The first time this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. If this card is sent to the GY for the Synchro Summon of a Beast monster: Draw 1 card. If this face-up card you control leaves the field by your opponent's card effect, banish it.

action: Activates if used as Synchro Material
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
